de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class AbstractExecutionVariable

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionVariable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionVariable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecutionVariable, ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable, ExecutionVariableExtractor.StateExecutionVariable

    public abstract class AbstractExecutionVariable
extends AbstractExecutionElement
implements IExecutionVariable
    Provides a basic implementation of IExecutionVariables.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Term additionalCondition
      An optional additional condition to consider.
      private Term arrayIndex
      The index in the parent array.
      private PosInOccurrence modalityPIO
      The PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest.
      private IExecutionValue parentValue
      The parent ExecutionValue or null if not available.
      private IProgramVariable programVariable
      The represented IProgramVariable which value is shown.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractExecutionVariable(ITreeSettings settings, Node proofNode, IProgramVariable programVariable, IExecutionValue parentValue, Term arrayIndex, Term additionalCondition, PosInOccurrence modalityPIO)
      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Term getAdditionalCondition()
      Returns the optional additional condition considered during value computation.
      Term getArrayIndex()
      Returns the index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.
      String getArrayIndexString()
      Returns the human readable index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.
      String getElementType()
      Returns a human readable element type name.
      PosInOccurrence getModalityPIO()
      Returns the PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest including updates.
      IExecutionValue getParentValue()
      Returns the parent IExecutionValue if available.
      IProgramVariable getProgramVariable()
      Returns the IProgramVariable which contains the represented value.
      boolean isArrayIndex()
      Checks if the current value is part of a parent array.
      protected String lazyComputeName()
      Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.

    • Field Detail

      • programVariable

        private final IProgramVariable programVariable
        The represented IProgramVariable which value is shown.

      • parentValue

        private final IExecutionValue parentValue
        The parent ExecutionValue or null if not available.

      • arrayIndex

        private final Term arrayIndex
        The index in the parent array.

      • additionalCondition

        private final Term additionalCondition
        An optional additional condition to consider.

      • modalityPIO

        private final PosInOccurrence modalityPIO
        The PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractExecutionVariable

        public AbstractExecutionVariable(ITreeSettings settings,
                                 Node proofNode,
                                 IProgramVariable programVariable,
                                 IExecutionValue parentValue,
                                 Term arrayIndex,
                                 Term additionalCondition,
                                 PosInOccurrence modalityPIO)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
        proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
        programVariable - The represented IProgramVariable which value is shown.
        parentValue - The parent IExecutionValue or null if not available.
        arrayIndex - The index in the parent array.
        additionalCondition - An optional additional condition to consider.
        modalityPIO - The PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest.

        Returns the optional additional condition considered during value computation.

        Returns:
        The optional additional condition considered during value computation.

      • lazyComputeName

        protected String lazyComputeName()
                          throws ProofInputException
        Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.
        Specified by:
        lazyComputeName in class AbstractExecutionElement
        Returns:
        The human readable name of this IExecutionNode.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • getArrayIndex

        public Term getArrayIndex()
        Returns the index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.
        Specified by:
        getArrayIndex in interface IExecutionVariable
        Returns:
        The index in the parent array or null if no array cell value is represented.

        Returns the human readable index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.

        Returns:
        The human readable index in the parent array or null if no array cell value is represented.

      • isArrayIndex

        public boolean isArrayIndex()
        Checks if the current value is part of a parent array.
        Specified by:
        isArrayIndex in interface IExecutionVariable
        Returns:
        true is array cell value, false is a "normal" value.

        getParentValue in interface IExecutionVariable
